task.name: Cost Tracker
task.description: Track and report LLM token usage and estimated costs. Use when the user says 'show costs' or 'track budget' or 'cost dashboard'.
task.objective: Track token usage per workflow, report estimated costs, and alert on budget thresholds

input.name: budget_limit
input.desc: Monthly budget limit in USD (for set-budget action)

step.title: Load or Initialize Cost Log
step.action: Check for existing cost log at {governance_artifacts}/cost-log.yaml

check.action: Create new cost log with default structure:
Aggregate token counts by: workflow name, agent, date
Calculate estimated costs using standard model pricing:
Update monthly_limit in cost log to {{budget_limit}}
Calculate remaining budget for current month
Report: Budget set to ${{budget_limit}}/month. $X remaining this month.

check.ask: This will clear all cost tracking data. Are you sure? [Y/N]

check.action: Reset cost log to default structure
Report: Cost tracking data has been reset.

task.note: Cost estimates are approximate based on standard API pricing. Actual costs depend on your API plan, caching, and prompt optimization. This tracker provides directional guidance, not precise billing data.
